title: VonHaus Seagrass Storage Baskets, Set of 4 Hand-Woven Display Hampers - Bathroom Storage Baskets for Shelves - Nesting Natural Woven Seagrass Organiser w/Handles for Bedroom & Home Office
features: 100% NATURAL SEAGRASS: Infuse your home organisation with a bohemian touch with the VonHaus seagrass storage baskets, featuring a natural colourway and charming weave to complement any décor.

STACKABLE STORAGE: Whether you’re de-cluttering your bathroom, bedroom, or hallway, make these four storage baskets work for your space. The nested design makes them the perfect storage baskets for shelves.

STRONG STEEL FRAME: Each wicker storage basket features a robust steel frame and insert handles, so you can load up and transport your belongings with confidence. Dimensions: H15 x W30 x D22cm per woven basket.
ARTISANAL TOUCH: Thanks to the handcrafted design, each seagrass basket will differ slightly from the next. Display your new bathroom storage baskets with pride, knowing that they are totally unique!

OUR BRAND PROMISE: Established in 2009, VonHaus is the answer to your home organisation needs. Crafted to the highest standards with functionality in mind, use our seagrass storage baskets with confidence.
description: Product Description Functional home storage, made stylish. VonHaus Set of 4 Seagrass Storage Baskets for Bathroom Level up your home organisation with these VonHaus storage baskets. Whether you need a dedicated home for spare kitchen utensils, or a simple solution for hallway clutter – the choice is yours! With four baskets , spread the woven charm around your home. Coordinate and declutter in boho style today. Functional home storage, made stylish. Stackable Woven Basket Set with Handles | Storage Baskets for Shelves Who said storage had to be all functionality and no flair? Handmade for authenticity , this woven basket set pairs style and purpose. Use the built-in carry handles to transport the wicker baskets from room to room; perfect for moving toiletries from your bathroom to your bedroom, or accessing spare stationary with ease. When not in use, nest the bathroom storage baskets within each other, and store neatly away until your next jumble detox. Each wicker storage basket measures H15 x W30 x D22cm . Previous page Perfect for Any Room Get your whole home in order, and do it in style. Organise your bathroom, hallway or kitchen; from toiletries to pantry supplies, we've got it sorted. Sleek Stackable Storage Featuring wire framework for sturdy reliability. Ideal for ad hoc use, these wicker baskets can be nested within each other for convenient storage. 100% Natural Seagrass Bringing an authentic touch of rustic charm. Well-loved in many homes, the natural weave of these baskets offers a charming addition to any room. VonHaus baskets are woven from natural seagrass, chosen for its strength and natural look that suits a wide range of home interiors. What can i store in these baskets? They are ideal for everyday items including tv remotes, magazines and books. The baskets can even be used for bathroom items like towels and toilet roll. A perfect addition to your living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom and home office. Will each basket look exactly the same? No. As they are made from natural materials, slight variations in colour, weave and texture are normal and part of the product’s character.
